text: A vehicle shall not be driven over any unprotected hose of a fire department when laid down on any highway or private way or place for use at any fire or alarm of fire or practice runs, without the consent of the fire department official in command.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.913 — Crossing fire hose.

A vehicle shall not be driven over any unprotected hose of a fire department when laid down on any highway or private way or place for use at any fire or alarm of fire or practice runs, without the consent of the fire department official in command.

subsections.text: A vehicle shall not be driven over any unprotected hose of a fire department when laid down on any highway or private way or place for use at any fire or alarm of fire or practice runs, without the consent of the fire department official in command.
